hero.headline: Yi hasashen motsin kasuwa na gaba
hero.subhead: Zaɓi matsayi kan alkiblar farashi, sama ko ƙasa, ka ga sakamako cikin daƙiƙu.

features.heading: An tsara don sauri da bayyananne
features.subheading: Aiwatar da sauri, biyan kuɗi na gaskiya da yanke shawara cikin sauƙi.
features.tradeInSecondsDesc: Sakamako mai sauri, babu jiran gado.
features.clearPayoutsDesc: Ka sani tun da wuri nawa za ka iya samu.
features.globalMarketsDesc: Yi ciniki da kowane kadara a kowane lokaci.

howItWorks.heading: Matakai uku.
howItWorks.subheading: Babu nazarin zane. Babu kalmomi na musamman. Yanke shawara ɗaya mai sauƙi kawai.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Zaɓi nawa za ku saka — daga $1 zuwa $10,000.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Farashin zai hau ko ya sauka? Zaɓi alkibla.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Sakamako cikin daƙiƙu. Riba tana shiga nan take.

fairness.heading: Ajiyar kuɗi bayyananne
fairness.description: Aika kuɗi cikin aminci ta hanyoyin biya da kuka sani.

stats.heading: 'Yan kasuwa sun amince
stats.subheading: Ku haɗa da dubunnan da suke samun riba a Arcanine

faq.heading: Tambayoyin da ake yi sau da yawa
faq.contactPrompt: Ba ku sami abin da kuke nema ba?
faq.a1: Kayan aikin kuɗi inda kuke hasashen ko farashin kadara zai hau ko ya sauka.
faq.a2: Yi rajista kyauta kuma ku saka kuɗi.
faq.q3: Waɗanne kadarori zan iya cinikin su?
faq.a3: Forex, crypto, hannun jari, kayayyaki da fihirisa.
faq.a4: Ana aiwatarwa cikin kwanaki 1-2 na aiki.
faq.a5: Ɓoye bayanai na matakin banki da asusun daban.
faq.a7: Asusun gwaji na $10,000 na kuɗin bogi.
faq.q8: Waɗanne lokutan ciniki ake da su?

demo.heading: Yi ciniki da kuɗin bogi
demo.bullet2: Cikawa marar iyaka a kowane lokaci

footer.description: Dandali na binary options na zamani don sauri, bayyananne da ciniki mai daidaito.
footer.riskWarningText: Cinikin binary options yana ɗauke da babban haɗari.
footer.riskDisclosureText: Binary options kayan aikin kuɗi ne masu rikitarwa.
footer.noGuaranteeText: Babu dabara da ke tabbatar da riba.
footer.liabilityText: Arcanine ba ta da alhakin asara.

riskWarning.title: Gargaɗin haɗari na gaba ɗaya
riskWarning.text1: Cinikin binary options yana da babban haɗari.
riskWarning.text2: Tuntuɓi mashawarcin kuɗi mai zaman kansa idan kuna da shakka.

trustStrip.global: Ana samun shi a duniya baki ɗaya
